ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Aug-15-2012 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of Petition For Final Distribution Or Petition For Approval Of Status Report
Off Calendar Jul-18-2012 Continued To Aug-15-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

An Order to Appear will be issued to the Attorney and the Executor to appear on August 15, 2012 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why they failed appear and why a Petition for Final Distribution or a Petition for Approval of Status Report has not been filed. If no appearance is made on that day or no explanation is provided, sanctions in the amount of $25.00 per day will be begin to run against the Attorney and the Executor. The status hearing was continued to August 15, 2012 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Peter Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy W. Weatherly.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Apr-27-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Michael Marquez for Ignacio Orozco (Petitioner).

Mr. Marquez stated that the purpose of the administration of the Estate was due to a piece of property that put into the Trust and then taken out of the Trust by Rosalie Orozco a couple of years prior to her death, that there was a civil action case number 487037 between Ignacio Orozco (Plaintiff) and Celia Lozita (Defendant) and that they were trying to get the property back into the Trust. The Court granted the petition appointing Ignacio Orozco as the Administrator of the Estate of Rosalie Orozco with no Independent Administration of Estates Act powers (subject to a written order).

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy V. Jung.
